name: inventory_agent
description: Calculates safety stock, reorder points, Economic Order Quantity (EOQ), and outputs optimization recommendations based on demand forecasts.

capabilities.name: calculate_inventory_recommendations
capabilities.description: Generate safety stock, reorder points, and recommended order quantities using demand forecasts.

data_path.description: Path to the cleaned inventory CSV file (e.g. data/processed/cleaned_data.csv)

predictions.description: Optional demand forecasting prediction values corresponding to the rows of the cleaned data.

service_level_z.description: Z-score for service level (e.g. 1.28 for 90%, 1.65 for 95%, 2.33 for 99%)

output_path.description: Path to save inventory recommendations CSV (e.g. data/processed/inventory_recommendations.csv)

inventory_summary.description: Summary metrics including total items, reorder alerts count, average safety stock and ROP, and estimated costs.

output_path.description: Path where the recommendations CSV is saved
